name: hex
description: Hexagonal Architecture framework for LLM-driven development with token-efficient tree-sitter summaries

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --format esm && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm && mkdir -p dist/adapters/primary/dashboard && cp src/adapters/primary/dashboard/index.html dist/adapters/primary/dashboard/index.html && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/tree-sitter.wasm dist/tree-sitter.wasm 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun test
